data.body: Superseded: list-epics is being DEPRECATED to a thin wrapper over the generic list (one call epics + one call P0 bugs), tracked orthogonally in worm-burr-fly (7e0b-3f12-d35f-4e33) — not ported as a Tier C bash->Python port. Closing; Tier C (milky-tower-avail) continues with next-batch + validate.
